name: ai-music-studio
description: AI Music Studio — describe a vibe, get a finished song. Generate lyrics, full songs (vocals + music), or pure instrumentals through Mureka's state-of-the-art models. Bring your own lyrics or let the AI write them. Returns playable MP3, lossless FLAC, and uncompressed WAV links.

prompt.description: What you want — e.g. 'upbeat 80s pop song about Tuesdays', 'lo-fi instrumental for studying', 'turn these lyrics into a country ballad: ...'

summary.description: Short description of what was produced

lyrics.description: Final lyrics if a song was generated

songs.description: JSON-encoded list of generated audio assets ({mp3,flac,wav} URLs and duration)
